Package neqsim.statistics.parameterfitting

Class FittingParameter

java.lang.Object
neqsim.statistics.parameterfitting.FittingParameter
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class FittingParameter extends Object implements Serializable
Definition of one fitted model parameter including bounds, transform and prior metadata.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Even Solbraa
See Also:

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    FittingParameter()
    Creates a default parameter definition for serialization frameworks.
    FittingParameter(String name, double initialValue, double lowerBound, double upperBound)
    Creates a bounded linear fitting parameter.
    FittingParameter(String name, double initialValue, double lowerBound, double upperBound, String unit, ParameterTransform transform, String category, double priorValue, double priorStandardDeviation)
    Creates a complete fitting parameter definition.

  • Constructor Details

    • FittingParameter

      public FittingParameter()
      Creates a default parameter definition for serialization frameworks.

    • FittingParameter

      public FittingParameter(String name, double initialValue, double lowerBound, double upperBound)
      Creates a bounded linear fitting parameter.
      Parameters:
      name - parameter name
      initialValue - initial physical parameter value
      lowerBound - lower physical parameter bound
      upperBound - upper physical parameter bound

    • FittingParameter

      public FittingParameter(String name, double initialValue, double lowerBound, double upperBound, String unit, ParameterTransform transform, String category, double priorValue, double priorStandardDeviation)
      Creates a complete fitting parameter definition.
      Parameters:
      name - parameter name
      initialValue - initial physical parameter value
      lowerBound - lower physical parameter bound
      upperBound - upper physical parameter bound
      unit - parameter unit label
      transform - parameter-space transform
      category - parameter category or physical meaning
      priorValue - optional prior value, or NaN when unused
      priorStandardDeviation - optional prior standard deviation, or NaN when unused

  • Method Details

    • validate

      public void validate()
      Validates the parameter definition.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if values or bounds are invalid

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the parameter name.
      Returns:
      parameter name

    • setName

      public void setName(String name)
      Sets the parameter name.
      Parameters:
      name - parameter name

      public double getInitialValue()
      Returns the initial physical value.
      Returns:
      initial physical value

    • setInitialValue

      public void setInitialValue(double initialValue)
      Sets the initial physical value.
      Parameters:
      initialValue - initial physical value

      public double getLowerBound()
      Returns the lower physical bound.
      Returns:
      lower physical bound

    • setLowerBound

      public void setLowerBound(double lowerBound)
      Sets the lower physical bound.
      Parameters:
      lowerBound - lower physical bound

    • getUpperBound

      public double getUpperBound()
      Returns the upper physical bound.
      Returns:
      upper physical bound

    • setUpperBound

      public void setUpperBound(double upperBound)
      Sets the upper physical bound.
      Parameters:
      upperBound - upper physical bound

    • getUnit

      public String getUnit()
      Returns the unit label.
      Returns:
      unit label

    • setUnit

      public void setUnit(String unit)
      Sets the unit label.
      Parameters:
      unit - unit label

    • getTransform

      public ParameterTransform getTransform()
      Returns the parameter transform.
      Returns:
      parameter transform

    • setTransform

      public void setTransform(ParameterTransform transform)
      Sets the parameter transform.
      Parameters:
      transform - parameter transform

    • getCategory

      public String getCategory()
      Returns the parameter category.
      Returns:
      parameter category

    • setCategory

      public void setCategory(String category)
      Sets the parameter category.
      Parameters:
      category - parameter category

    • getPriorValue

      public double getPriorValue()
      Returns the optional prior value.
      Returns:
      prior value, or NaN when unused

    • setPriorValue

      public void setPriorValue(double priorValue)
      Sets the optional prior value.
      Parameters:
      priorValue - prior value, or NaN when unused

    • getPriorStandardDeviation

      public double getPriorStandardDeviation()
      Returns the optional prior standard deviation.
      Returns:
      prior standard deviation, or NaN when unused

    • setPriorStandardDeviation

      public void setPriorStandardDeviation(double priorStandardDeviation)
      Sets the optional prior standard deviation.
      Parameters:
      priorStandardDeviation - prior standard deviation, or NaN when unused

    • hasPrior

      public boolean hasPrior()
      Returns whether this parameter has a usable Gaussian prior.
      Returns:
      true if prior value and standard deviation are configured

    • getInternalInitialValue

      public double getInternalInitialValue()
      Converts the initial value to optimizer space.
      Returns:
      initial value in optimizer space

    • getInternalBounds

      public double[] getInternalBounds()
      Converts the physical bounds to optimizer-space bounds.
      Returns:
      optimizer bounds, or null if the transformed parameter is unbounded

    • toExternalValue

      public double toExternalValue(double internalValue)
      Converts an optimizer-space value to physical space.
      Parameters:
      internalValue - optimizer-space value
      Returns:
      physical parameter value

    • defaultString

      private static String defaultString(String value, String defaultValue)
      Returns a default string when the value is null.
      Parameters:
      value - user-supplied value
      defaultValue - fallback value
      Returns:
      value or defaultValue

    • validateFinite

      private static void validateFinite(String name, double value)
      Validates that a number is finite.
      Parameters:
      name - value name used in exception messages
      value - value to validate
